query: hey can you review the changes in PR #847? it's a new caching layer for the inventory service and i want to make sure we're not missing edge cases around cache invalidation
I just pushed a fix for the login timeout bug to dakaneye/fix-login-timeout. Can you take a look before I request review from the team?
do a security audit of the authentication middleware in src/middleware/auth.ts — we're about to go to production and I want a second pair of eyes on the JWT validation
I need you to review chainguard-dev/apko#312. It changes how APK packages are resolved and I'm worried about backwards compatibility with existing configs
/review-code https://github.com/chainguard-dev/melange/pull/1456
take a look at the diff on my current branch and tell me if there are any obvious problems before i open a PR
can you review the database migration in db/migrations/045_add_status_column.sql? i want to make sure it's safe for a rolling deploy
review my batch processing changes — i refactored OrderProcessor.java and i'm nervous about the error handling in the new retry loop
we got a GAS alert on the main branch for CVE-2024-1234 in our dependency tree. can you help me fix it?
write unit tests for the UserService class in src/services/user.ts — we need at least 80% coverage for the new search endpoint
can you explain how the circuit breaker pattern works in our notification service? I'm trying to understand the retry logic
refactor the PaymentProcessor to use the strategy pattern instead of the switch statement. keep the same behavior.
check if the CI checks are passing on PR #234 — the build seems stuck and I can't tell if it's a flaky test or a real failure
help me write a new endpoint for the admin API that lets us bulk-delete inactive users older than 90 days
can you review my quarterly goals and tell me if they're specific enough? I have 'improve system reliability' as one of them
investigate why the webhook handler is dropping events in production — we're seeing gaps in our payment reconciliation
create a PR from my current branch to main with a good description of the caching changes
I need to respond to the review comments on my PR — can you help me address the feedback about error handling?
run the linter and fix any issues it finds in the src/ directory
